summary: Tested all 4 homepage performance optimization fixes. All fixes verified as PASSING: (1) Hero logo uses <picture> with WebP source, loading=eager, fetchpriority=high, (2) All 15 service card images use <picture> with WebP source and JPG fallback, (3) _headers file exists with correct cache rules, (4) All service cards have loading=lazy. Regression tests confirm all images render correctly and all links work.

fix1_hero_logo_webp.details: Hero logo found with data-testid='hero-logo-desktop'. Uses <picture> tag with WebP source (/images/hero-logo-new.webp). Has loading='eager' and fetchpriority='high' as expected for above-fold content.

fix2_service_cards_webp.details: All 15 service cards (9 Kitchen, 2 Laundry, 4 Commercial) use tags with WebP and JPG fallback . WebP imports verified in ProfessionalLandingPage.js lines 30-44.

fix3_cache_headers.details: _headers file exists at /app/frontend/public/_headers with correct cache rules: /static/* (1 year immutable), /*.webp (1 year immutable), /*.jpg (30 days), /*.png (30 days).

fix4_lazy_loading.details: All 15 service card images have loading='lazy'. Hero logo correctly has loading='eager' for above-fold content.

regression_images.details: Hero logo visible and renders correctly. All service card images load successfully with no broken images across Kitchen, Laundry, and Commercial categories.

regression_links.details: All 15 service card links work correctly, pointing to their respective repair pages (e.g., /refrigerator-repair, /washer-repair, /commercial-refrigerator-repair).

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 homepage performance optimization fixes completed and verified. WebP conversion working for hero logo and all 15 service card images. Cache headers configured in _headers file. Lazy loading implemented for below-fold images.
